title: Stave Diagnose Output Schema v1
description: Schema for Stave diagnose JSON output. Contains diagnostic cases with signals, evidence, and suggested remediation actions.

report.title: Diagnostic Report
report.description: The diagnostic report containing individual diagnostic cases and an evaluation summary.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostic Cases
diagnostics.description: List of diagnostic cases identified during analysis.

items.title: Diagnostic Case Entry
items.description: A single diagnostic case with its signal, evidence, and recommended action.

signal.title: Signal Level
signal.description: Signal level indicating the diagnostic severity (e.g., warning, info, error).

evidence.title: Supporting Evidence
evidence.description: Human-readable evidence supporting this diagnostic case.

action.title: Recommended Action
action.description: Recommended remediation action to resolve this diagnostic.

command.title: Suggested Command
command.description: Optional suggested CLI command to help resolve this diagnostic.

summary.title: Evaluation Context Summary
summary.description: Summary of the evaluation context used during diagnosis.

total_snapshots.title: Total Snapshot Count
total_snapshots.description: Total number of observation snapshots analyzed.

total_assets.title: Total Asset Count
total_assets.description: Total number of unique assets across all snapshots.

total_controls.title: Total Control Count
total_controls.description: Total number of controls loaded for evaluation.

time_span.title: Observation Time Span
time_span.description: Human-readable duration between the earliest and latest observation snapshots (e.g., 10d, 48h).

min_captured_at.title: Earliest Capture Timestamp
min_captured_at.description: UTC timestamp (RFC 3339) of the earliest observation snapshot.

max_captured_at.title: Latest Capture Timestamp
max_captured_at.description: UTC timestamp (RFC 3339) of the latest observation snapshot.

evaluation_time.title: Evaluation Reference Time
evaluation_time.description: UTC timestamp (RFC 3339) used as the evaluation reference time.

attack_surface.title: Currently Unsafe Count
attack_surface.description: Number of assets currently in an unsafe state.
